full_text:
Duan Mo 段默
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Duan Mo (段默)was born in Jingzhao commandery. Defended Xiahou Mao against false accusations. Duan Mo was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
